pages.name: How to Level Up (60 Seconds at the Bonfire)

text.content:
Leveling happens only at the Firelink bonfire, where the Fire Keeper sits. It takes about a minute. Here is the whole procedure:

The four steps

  1. The DM runs the Level Up macro. It spends the banked-souls cost from the shared pool, raises everyone's class level by 1, grants the automatic backbone — HP (every hero), proficiency scaling, and Extra Attack at level 5 — and posts a chat card with a button for each character.
  2. Each player clicks their own button on the chat card. A picker opens on your screen.
  3. Make your Ashen pick. Choose +1 to an ability score (it raises the real score on your sheet) or a spell of an unlocked tier. Reaching 15 in a score auto-grants its milestone.
  4. Skill levels (6 & 9 only): the picker also offers a Weapon Art. See the last page.

The one decision that matters

Every level you choose +1 ability OR a spell:

  • Go tall — pour points into one score to deepen its scaling and reach its 15 milestone.
  • Go wide — branch toward a second 15 to unlock another power.
  • Casters spend picks on spells instead of scores — powerful, but they stay fragile. Glass cannons by choice.

Anyone can cast if they carry the catalyst; your casting stat (INT/WIS/IW) decides how hard it hits. The trade-off is the build.

Soul cost curve (banked souls)

LevelCostRunning total
3 → 4500500
4 → 58001,300
5 → 61,2002,500
6 → 71,8004,300
7 → 82,6006,900
8 → 93,60010,500
9 → 105,00015,400

Boss kills cover roughly half of this; farming, the dragon, and hollows cover the rest.

Auto-backbone (free, every level)

  • Everyone rises to level 4 and gains HP automatically.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score — STR, DEX, VIG, INT, WIS, or IW. It raises the real score; hit 15 and you unlock that stat's milestone. (Vigor also grants +5 HP.)
  • OR a Tier-1 spell — any T1 sorcery, miracle, or pyromancy (carry the matching catalyst to cast it).

Tier available: Tier 1 only.

Auto-backbone

  • Rise to level 5: +HP, proficiency bonus rises to +3.
  • Martials gain Extra Attack — you now Strike twice with the Attack action.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score, OR
  • a Tier-1 spell.

Tier available: Tier 1. (Tier 2 unlocks at level 6.)

pages.name: Level 5 → 6  (cost: 1,200 souls)  — TIER 2 UNLOCKS + Skill pick

text.content:
Auto-backbone

  • Rise to level 6: +HP.

Tier 2 is now available

Everyone who casts may now learn Tier-2 spells — tier access is by level, no stat gate.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score, OR
  • a spell from Tier 1–2.

+ Weapon Art

This is a skill level: you also choose one Weapon Art from the picker (see last page). Martial or caster — your choice.

Auto-backbone

  • Rise to level 7: +HP.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score, OR
  • a spell from Tier 1–2.

Tier available: Tier 1–2.

Auto-backbone

  • Rise to level 8: +HP.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score, OR
  • a spell from Tier 1–2.

Tier available: Tier 1–2. (Tier 3 unlocks at level 9.)

pages.name: Level 8 → 9  (cost: 3,600 souls)  — TIER 3 UNLOCKS + Skill pick

text.content:
Auto-backbone

  • Rise to level 9: +HP, proficiency bonus rises to +4.

Tier 3 is now available

You may now learn Tier-3 spells — the scene-enders. Heads up: a Tier-3 spell has 0 casts until you own your school's 15 milestone (INT/WIS/IW 15). Without it you can hold the spell but not cast it.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score, OR
  • a spell from Tier 1–3.

+ Weapon Art

Everyone chooses a second Weapon Art (see last page).

Auto-backbone

  • Rise to level 10: +HP.

Your pick — choose ONE

  • +1 ability score, OR
  • a spell from Tier 1–3.

This is the build you take into Vordt. Casters: a fragile apex with a Tier-3 scene-ender. Fighters: a wall of HP and damage with their stat milestones online. Both are correct.

At levels 6 and 9 everyone also takes a Weapon Art — a juicy active trick, offered right in the level-up picker. Martial and caster arts are both open to anyone.

Martial

  • Stomp — bonus-action shove + advantage on your next hit.
  • Perseverance — reaction: temp HP + stagger-immunity for a round.
  • Spin Slash — hit everyone adjacent at once.
  • Charge — rush in; prone on hit.
  • Quickstep — bonus-action 15-ft blink, no opportunity attacks.
  • Leo Riposte — your parry-ripostes deal +2 weapon dice.

Caster

  • Steady Chant — next spell uninterruptible, +2 DC.
  • Crystallize — 1/bonfire, a wholly-missed spell refunds its cast.
  • Pyromancer's Fervor — fire spells crit on 19–20.
  • Sage's Focus — 1/bonfire, cast a Tier-1 spell as a bonus action.

Universal

  • Estus Mastery — +1 Estus charge and quaff as a bonus action.
